about.en: Bithumb is a South Korean centralized cryptocurrency exchange. It is known for Korean won spot markets and retail crypto trading services.
about.es: Bithumb es un exchange centralizado de criptomonedas de Corea del Sur. Es conocido por mercados spot en won coreano y servicios de trading cripto retail.
about.ca: Bithumb es un exchange centralitzat de criptomonedes de Corea del Sud. Es conegut per mercats spot en won corea i serveis de trading cripto retail.
